//: Minimal webview-diff config. Copy to webview-diff.config.json and edit. `webview-diff init` scaffolds this for you.
title: My App · webview-diff
//bridge: Optional. Only needed if your web depends on a JS bridge (window.<Name>). Omit for plain web apps. platform + safe-area insets are injected automatically per profile.
//perf: Optional performance axis (Web Vitals). Reliable on Chromium; WebKit reports load/bytes only.
